_comment: HOW TO ADD AN EVENT: Add a new object to the 'events' array below. Required fields: id (unique slug, e.g. 'rooftop-mixer-may-29'), title, date (YYYY-MM-DD), time (e.g. '7:00 PM'), location, status ('upcoming' or 'past'). Optional: endTime, address, description, hosts (array of { name, avatar }), image (path under /assets/), rsvpUrl. Host avatars use resident photos — format is '/assets/residents/FirstLast.webp'. See existing entries for examples.

events.title: Rooftop Kickoff Mixer
events.description: Kick off the summer with fellow interns and guests at the Chelsea Commons rooftop. Meet your neighbors, share what you're working on, and enjoy the Manhattan skyline. Drinks and light bites provided.

events.title: Intern Dinner
events.description: A communal dinner for Chelsea Commons residents and invited guests. We'll be cooking together and sharing food from our respective backgrounds. Come hungry.

events.title: Startup Demo Night
events.description: Residents and guests present what they've been building this summer. Short demos, big ideas. Open to the wider NYC intern community — bring your friends.

events.title: Chelsea Gallery Walk
events.description: Explore Chelsea's world-famous gallery district together. We toured 5 galleries and grabbed coffee after. No art background needed — just curiosity.

events.title: Hacker House Kickoff
events.description: The official kickoff for the Chelsea Commons summer. All 12 residents gathered for the first time — introductions, a shared dinner, and the beginning of something special.
